sections.paragraph:
Original: גּוּני

Transliteration: gûnı̂y

Phonetic: goo-nee'

BDB Definition:

Guni = "my defender (?)"
  1. a son of Naphtali and founder of the family of Gunites
  2. a descendant of Gad

Origin: probably from H1598

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
